difficulty_note: First direct Giovanni fight. It should feel like the Game Corner boss payoff while staying fair on default difficulty.

player_side.story_support: Red holds the command-floor door so Giovanni cannot flood the room with Rocket reinforcements.

slots.role: classic Rocket ground pressure and command-floor wall
early Giovanni identity and physical pressure
boss ace with speed, money, and intimidation motif

opponent.intent: protect the Silph Scope cache, test Antman directly, and retreat once the Nexus Order terminal proves Rocket is being manipulated
